category_sources: Official Ghostscript documentation describes Ghostscript as an interpreter for PostScript language and PDF files.
source_facts.description says it is an interpreter for PostScript and PDF.
display_name_sources: Official Ghostscript site and documentation use Ghostscript.
docs_sources: Ghostscript Read the Docs site is the current public documentation surface linked from official materials.
Official Ghostscript documentation index is hosted on ghostscript.com.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ArtifexSoftware/ghostpdl-downloads; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official documentation covers PostScript/PDF use, devices, and Ghostscript user/developer guides.
source_facts.description says interpreter for PostScript and PDF.
